title: urodon dasyphyllus
intro: Urodon dasyphyllus is a flowering plant species native to Australia, commonly known as the 'bitter pea'. The medicinal properties of Urodon dasyphyllus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Urodon dasyphyllus include its ability to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Urodon dasyphyllus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
